intro: Stenandriopsis warneckei is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical regions of East Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, and its extracts have been found to possess antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities, offering potential health benefits in the treatment of various ailments, including wounds, fever, and digestive issues.
